title: no game no life pvp
description: a pvp texture package attached to no game no life there will be more updates to come have fun
body:
![In game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e90e0b7023443773c2190813183179b9787f537_0.webp)A PvP texture pack attached to no game no life. There will be more updates to come. I'm working very actively and would be happy if you could test out the package and maybe give feedback on my discord
- **functions**
- clean concrete
- costom Crosshair
- costem cpvp items
- costem lava and fire
- costem menu
- and...
> This is my first real texture pack, I'm working very actively on new versions, I hope you like it
